title: 18 Managing Wire Templates
body_text:
18	Managing Wire Templates
18.1	Overview of Wire Templates
Wire templates are useful for creating outgoing wires that you send on a regular basis. Users with permission to create outgoing wires can also create templates. To use, edit, or delete a template, a user requires access to the sending transit number associated with the template. Authorized users can restore templates that are pending deletion or delete templates permanently from the Wires application. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS, for more information on Wires User profiles and permissions.
18.2	Creating a Wire Template
To create a wire template:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Templates
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select ГўВҖВңTemplatesГўВҖВқ
Select the template type (
Create Regular
or
Create Bank to Bank
). See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Select the Template Type
Enter a name for the template, then complete the template details. See Figure 3. Select
Next
to proceed.
Note:	You must complete all mandatory fields to save the template. See Chapter 16, Creating a Regular Wire, or Chapter 17, Creating a Bank to Bank Wire, for information on completing the wire details section.
Tip
:	Establish a naming convention for consistency (e.g., senderГўВҖВҷs name plus beneficiaryГўВҖВҷs name). Create a spreadsheet with the template name and ID, the ordering customerГўВҖВҷs name, and the beneficiaryГўВҖВҷs name, for reference.
Figure 3: Complete Template Details
Review the template details, then select
Create Wire Template
. See Figure 4. Alternatively, select
Edit
to make changes to the template or
Cancel
to cancel the template.
Figure 4: Select ГўВҖВңCreate Wire TemplateГўВҖВқ
A message displays, confirming the wire template was successfully created. The template status is ГўВҖВңActiveГўВҖВқ. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Template Confirmation
18.3	Viewing a Wire Template
To view a wire template:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Templates
, then select
Manage Templates
. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Select ГўВҖВңTemplatesГўВҖВқ
Enter search criteria to find a specific template, then select
Filter
. See Figure 7.
Note:	Select
Templates Pending Deletion
to view templates that have a ГўВҖВңPending DeletionГўВҖВқ status.
Figure 7: Filter Templates
Select the appropriate template name to view the template details. See Figure 8.
Note:	You can create an outgoing wire from a template with an ГўВҖВңActiveГўВҖВқ status. If the template has an ГўВҖВңInactiveГўВҖВқ status, you must first edit the template to correct information that failed validation.
Figure 8: Select the Template Name
18.4	Editing a Wire Template
To edit a wire template:
Search for and select the appropriate template as described in Section 18.3, Viewing a Wire Template.
Select
Edit
on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Select ГўВҖВңEditГўВҖВқ
Edit the template as required, then select
Next
. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: Select ГўВҖВңNextГўВҖВқ after Template Changes
Select
Save Wire Template
to confirm the changes. See Figure 11. Alternatively, select
Edit
to make additional changes to the template or
Cancel
to cancel the changes.
Figure 11: Save Wire Template
A message displays confirming the wire template is successfully updated. See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Update Template Confirmation
Note:	The Template Information section on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page displays the user that last edited the template. See Figure 13.
Figure 13: User that Edited the Template
18.5	Deleting a Wire Template from the List of Available Templates
When you delete a wire template, itГўВҖВҷs removed from the list of available templates and the template status is updated to ГўВҖВңPending DeletionГўВҖВқ. A deleted template isnГўВҖВҷt permanently removed from the Wires application until an authorized user permanently deletes it. See Section 18.7, Permanently Deleting a Wire Template, for more information.
To delete a wire template from the list of available templates:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Search for and select the appropriate template as described in Section 18.3, Viewing a Wire Template.
Select
Delete
on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page. See Figure 14.
Figure 14: Select Delete
Enter the reason for deleting the template, then select
Yes
. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: Enter the Reason for Deleting the Template
A message displays confirming the template is deleted from the list of active templates. See Figure 16.
Note:	The template status is changed to ГўВҖВңPending DeletionГўВҖВқ.
Figure 16: Deleted Template Confirmation
Templates that are pending deletion donГўВҖВҷt display in the list of available templates, but you can search for and view them using the appropriate search criteria. See Section 18.3, Viewing a Wire Template, for more information.
Note:	Authorized users can restore templates that are pending deletion, or permanently delete them from the Wires Application. See Section 18.6, Restoring a Wire Template, or Section 18.7, Permanently Deleting a Wire Template, for more information.
18.6	Restoring a Wire Template
Authorized users can restore wire templates that are pending deletion. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS, for more information on Wires permissions.
Note:	Once youГўВҖВҷve permanently deleted a template from the Wires application, it canГўВҖВҷt be restored.
To restore a wire template:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Templates
, then select
Manage Templates
. See Figure 17.
Figure 17: Select ГўВҖВңTemplatesГўВҖВқ
Select the ГўВҖВңTemplates Pending DeletionГўВҖВқ
check box, then select
Filter
. See Figure 18.
Note:	Enter additional search criteria to find a specific template.
Figure 18: Searching for a Template Pending Deletion
Select the appropriate template name to view the template details. See Figure 19.
Figure 19: Select ГўВҖВңTemplate NameГўВҖВқ
Select
Restore
Template
on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page. See Figure 20.
Figure 20: Select ГўВҖВңRestore TemplateГўВҖВқ
A message displays confirming the template is restored. See Figure 21.
Note:	The template status is changed to ГўВҖВңActiveГўВҖВқ.
Figure 21: Restored Template Confirmation
18.7	Permanently Deleting A Wire Template
Authorized users can permanently delete wire templates that are pending deletion. See Section 8.6, Creating a Wires User in MTS, for more information on Wires permissions.
Important
:	Once youГўВҖВҷve permanently deleted a template from the Wires application, it canГўВҖВҷt be restored.
To permanently delete a wire template:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
Templates
, then select
Manage Templates
. See Figure 22.
Figure 22: Select ГўВҖВңTemplatesГўВҖВқ
Select the ГўВҖВңTemplates Pending DeletionГўВҖВқ
check box, then select
Filter
. See Figure 23.
Note:	Enter additional search criteria to find a specific template.
Figure 23: Searching for a Template Pending Deletion
Select the appropriate template name to view the template details. See Figure 24.
Figure 24: Select ГўВҖВңTemplate NameГўВҖВқ
Select
Permanently Delete Template
on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page. See Figure 25.
Figure 25: Select ГўВҖВңPermanently Delete TemplateГўВҖВқ
Enter the reason for permanently deleting the template, then select
Yes
. See Figure 26.
Figure 26: Enter the Reason for Permanently Deleting the Template
A message displays confirming the template is successfully deleted from Wires application. See Figure 27.
Figure 27: Deleted Template Confirmation
18.8	Creating a Wire from a Template
As documented in previous chapters, your financial institution must comply with all regulatory requirements.
To create a wire from a template:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Locate and select the appropriate wire template as described in Section 18.3, Viewing a Wire Template.
Note:	You can create an outgoing wire from a template with an ГўВҖВңActiveГўВҖВқ status. If the template has an ГўВҖВңInactiveГўВҖВқ status, you must first edit the template to correct information that failed validation.
Select
Apply
on the Manage Templates ГўВҖВ“ Details page. See Figure 28.
Figure 28: Select Apply on the Manage Templates - Details Page
The wire pre-populates from the template details. Review and edit the wire as required. See Chapter 16, Creating a Regular Wire, or Chapter 17, Creating a Bank to Bank Wire (as appropriate), for instructions on completing wire fields.
END
